# matomo_tagmanager_tag_emarsys (Resource)

Emarsys is the largest independent marketing platform in the world.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example Emarsys Site"
  urls = ["https://example-emarsys.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example Emarsys Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  type         = "PageView"
  name         = "Example Emarsys Trigger"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_tag_emarsys" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-emarsys"
  fire_trigger_ids = [matomo_tagmanager_trigger.example.id]
  merchant_id = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `fire_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `merchant_id` (String) Your Emarsys Merchant ID
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `block_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `command_category` (String) Report the category currently browsed by the visitor.
- `command_go` (Boolean) Execute commands in the queue, that is, send them to the recommender service for processing.
- `command_tag` (String) Add an arbitrary tag to the current event. The tag is collected and can be accessed later from other Emarsys products.
- `command_view` (String) Report a product view.
- `status` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
